post:
This news can affect Indian investors:

EU weighs freezing Russian oil price cap as Middle East war lifts crude prices

Why it matters:
Oil risk can hit inflation, rupee and margins fast.

Missing angle: INR and margins react fast.

image.title: GLOBAL OIL SHOCK
image.topic: EU weighs freezing Russian oil price cap as Middle East war lifts crude prices
image.subtext: War Risk -> Oil Up -> Inflation Up -> Markets Volatile

thread:
This news can affect Indian investors:

EU weighs freezing Russian oil price cap as Middle East war lifts crude prices

Why it matters:
Oil risk can hit inflation, rupee and margins fast.

Missing angle: INR and margins react fast.
viralReplies:
This is not just geopolitics.
It is oil, INR, margins and market mood in one headline.

Most people ask, 'Is this good or bad?'
Investors should ask, 'Who benefits if this lasts?'

The market rarely waits for confirmation.
It starts moving when probability changes.
